step_rationale: Upregulated ACS biomarker; acyl-carnitine from leucine catabolism dysregulation.
mechanism: 3-Methylglutarylcarnitine elevation in ACS reflects perturbed branched-chain amino acid catabolism and myocardial metabolic stress.

references.title: Urinary metabonomic study of patients with acute coronary syndrome using UPLC-QTOF/MS.
references.journal: Journal of chromatography. B, Analytical technologies in the biomedical and life sciences
